untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit zigzag peak/trough detection with dynamic threshold calibration and head-and-shoulders pattern recognition. These require custom bar-by-bar pattern construction logic not expressible via simple indicator comparisons. Indicator list lacks: zigzag oscillator, peak/trough detector, or pattern recognition tools needed for head-and-shoulders identification.
translation_notes: Approximated using price reversals (close crossing prev_high/prev_low) and 2% return thresholds as proxy for zigzag threshold detection. This is a simplified representation; true implementation requires pattern detection beyond standard indicators. Direction marked CONTEXT_DEPENDENT since signal specifies both long (trough→rise) and short (peak→fall) setups.
